documents.title: Nominee 278
documents.summary: Nominee 278 financial disclosure form listing assets, liabilities, and transactions at the time of nomination. Reports employment positions held outside government, including corporate board memberships and officer roles.

documents.title: Ethics Agreement
documents.summary: Ethics agreement detailing specific restrictions, recusal requirements, and divestiture commitments for regulated holdings and business interests.

documents.title: Compliance Certification
documents.summary: Certification of ethics agreement compliance. Marked affirmatively on required sections including divestitures, periodic transaction reporting, recusal compliance, and ethics training completion.

documents.title: 278 Transaction Report
documents.summary: Periodic transaction report documenting securities transactions and other financial activity during tenure.
